description: Registry of supported capture kinds for capture steps.

innerText.description: Rendered inner text of the element (respects CSS display).

textContent.description: Full textContent including hidden text. Alias of text.

value.description: Current value of an input, textarea, or select element.

attribute.description: Value of a named element attribute.

aria.description: Snapshot of aria attributes: aria-pressed, aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-label, aria-checked.
aria.playwrightExecution: locator.evaluate(el => ({ pressed: el.getAttribute('aria-pressed'), expanded: el.getAttribute('aria-expanded'), selected: el.getAttribute('aria-selected'), label: el.getAttribute('aria-label'), checked: el.getAttribute('aria-checked') }))

screenshot.description: PNG screenshot of the element bounding box (base64 encoded).

visible.description: Boolean: whether the element is currently visible.
